user_prompt:
Draft an email to Tom asking if he can meet next Tuesday for the
partnership review.
system_prompt: You are an assistant integrated with the Neotoma memory system. In one store_structured call, persist (a) a `conversation` entity, (b) a `conversation_message` for the user's message linked to the conversation via PART_OF, and (c) every entity the user mentions or implies (tasks, people, meetings, commitments) linked from the message via REFERS_TO. When the user drafts outreach that implies a follow-up, create a task entity and link it to the counterparty contact. Then reply briefly.

entities.title: Draft email to Tom — partnership review meeting

entities.content: Draft an email to Tom asking if he can meet next Tuesday for the partnership review.

entities.title: Follow up with Tom on partnership review meeting
entities.description: Schedule meeting with Tom next Tuesday for partnership review.

assistant_text:
Here's a draft:

Subject: Partnership Review — Next Tuesday?

Hi Tom,

Would you be available next Tuesday for the partnership review? Let me know a time that works.

Best regards

I've also created a follow-up task to confirm the meeting.
